fields.System.Title: Epic: football-data.co.uk ingestion architecture (main + extra tracks)
fields.System.Description:
# Epic: football-data.co.uk ingestion architecture (main + extra tracks)

## Overview

Re-scope Story #1 from a generic placeholder to the football-data.co.uk ingestion architecture epic.

The epic defines two implementation tracks and one shared foundation:
- Main family ingestion and validation path for mmz4281 season/division CSV files.
- Extra family ingestion and validation path for new/<CODE>.csv files.
- Shared deterministic discovery and throttled HTTP behavior used by both tracks.

Lineage evidence:
- [architecture/football-data-ingestion.md](architecture/football-data-ingestion.md)
- [temp/8c8290a/extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json](temp/8c8290a/extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json)
- [temp/8c8290a/arch_extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json](temp/8c8290a/arch_extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json)

## Glossary

| Term | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| Main family | football-data.co.uk mmz4281 season-by-division CSV files (latin-1). |
| Extra family | football-data.co.uk new/<CODE>.csv files (utf-8-sig). |
| Discovery | Regex-based extraction of relevant file links from the source page using whitelist filtering. |
| Throttled client | Shared HTTP access layer enforcing deterministic pacing and fetch behavior. |
| Bronze outputs | Parquet artifacts persisted under family-specific bronze paths for downstream modeling. |

## Component Architecture Overview

- Discovery and throttled HTTP are foundational and must be implemented before family-specific ingestion execution.
- Story #2 owns deterministic discovery, whitelist filtering, and request pacing/caching policy with explicit current-season re-fetch behavior.
- Main track ingests mmz4281 files, applies row-level and frame-level validation, and writes football_main bronze parquet outputs.
- Extra track ingests new/<CODE>.csv files, applies row-level and frame-level validation, and writes football_extra bronze parquet outputs.
- Downstream dbt models consume these bronze artifacts as external sources in the medallion flow.

## Definition of Ready

- [ ] Source encodings and family-specific file patterns are documented for both tracks.
- [ ] Deterministic discovery and throttling policy is agreed and testable.
- [ ] Validation responsibilities are split into row-level and frame-level checks per track.
- [ ] Bronze output locations and naming expectations are agreed for downstream consumption.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Story #2 delivers deterministic discovery and throttled HTTP behavior with explicit acceptance criteria.
- [ ] Main-family bronze ingestion and validation path is implemented and writes stable football_main parquet outputs.
- [ ] Extra-family bronze ingestion and validation path is implemented and writes stable football_extra parquet outputs.
- [ ] All child stories include architecture lineage evidence links and measurable acceptance criteria.

## User Stories
- Discover and throttle football-data URL ingestion deterministically (2)
- Implement football_main_bronze ingestion and validation path (new-implement-football-main-bronze-ingestion-and-validation-path)
- Implement football_extra_bronze ingestion and validation path (new-implement-football-extra-bronze-ingestion-and-validation-path)
